title: SysAdminDoc/project-nomad-desktop
summary: Cross-platform desktop edition fork of Project N.O.M.A.D with more features and modern layout.

title: danilkryachko/dukememory
summary: Local-first AI agent memory for coding projects: SQLite context, MCP server, Codex skill, Rust CLI, and optional embeddings.

title: browseros-ai/BrowserOS
summary: 🌐 The open-source Agentic browser; alternative to ChatGPT Atlas, Perplexity Comet, Dia.

title: Oceanicabysslesothomonetaryunit652/llm-file-manager-agent
summary: 📁 Manage your files effortlessly using natural language with this LLM-powered assistant, combining intelligence and intuitive design for seamless navigation.

title: FallenUns/awto
summary: Privacy-first LLM autofill Chrome extension for personal form filling

title: inferctl/inferctl
summary: Agent-first CLI to explain local LLM stacks: discover providers, inspect models, diagnose health, and explain routing across Ollama, llama.cpp, OpenAI-compatible, LM Studio, and MLX backends.

title: hesamaria/rag-chatbot
summary: 🧠 Build a RAG-driven chatbot to answer user questions using real-world knowledge from documents, focused on mental health and social policy in Indonesia.

title: Chimdiiii/OpenMemory
summary: 🧠 Enhance AI with OpenMemory for long-term memory storage, recall, and explanation, using a unique cognitive architecture.

title: jpgomesr/neuralvault
summary: Self-hosted AI memory and knowledge platform for contextual retrieval. Hybrid semantic + keyword search powered by Qdrant and PostgreSQL, with multi-workspace support and BYOK multi-provider flexibility.

title: EuphoRiya37/SagaSpun---AI-Dungeon-Master-for-Dungeons-and-Dragons
summary: AI Dungeon Master for D&D-style RPGs — React Native/Expo frontend, Flask backend, Ollama/Mistral for narration

title: epatel/model-benchmark
summary: Benchmark AI coding models (Claude + Ollama local/cloud) on small tasks with ground-truth test oracles — bug fixes, features, refactors, race conditions & deadlocks.

title: getcodesetu/codesetu
summary: Open-source AI coding assistant for VSCode & JetBrains. Multi-provider (Sarvam, OpenAI-compatible, Ollama, vLLM). Built for Indian developers, public-sector teams, and air-gapped enterprises. Copilot/Cursor alternative.

title: earlvanze/sage-router
summary: Local-first AI model router for serious agents. One endpoint for OpenClaw, Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, Ollama, NVIDIA NIM, and authorized provider fallback.

title: devoxx/DevoxxGenieIDEAPlugin
summary: DevoxxGenie is a plugin for IntelliJ IDEA that uses local LLM's (Ollama, LMStudio, GPT4All, Jan and Llama.cpp) and Cloud based LLMs to help review, test, explain your project code. Latest version now also supports Spec Driven Development with CLI Runners.

title: bobbyjohnstx/tinycode
summary: A slim, local-LLM-first AI coding assistant. TUI, Web UI, and desktop app. Runs air-gapped with Ollama, vLLM, or any OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

title: unyieldingclaw-dev/ai-code-review-agent
summary: Multi-agent AI code reviewer powered by Ollama. Runs 12 specialized agents (security, performance, correctness, design, dependencies, and more) against your git diff and posts findings to PRs via GitHub Actions.

title: askalf/dario
summary: Your Claude Pro/Max subscription in any tool — Cursor, Cline, Aider, Agent SDK — at subscription pricing, not per-token bills. One local endpoint that replays Claude Code's wire shape so your traffic stays in the subscription pool.

title: ManifoldKit/ManifoldKit
summary: Reusable SwiftUI chat framework for local and cloud LLM inference on Apple platforms
